lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches, dents, or paint imperfections. The interior is in original condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are functioning perfectly.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor scratches and a few small paint chips. The interior is clean with light wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are fully operational and have been regularly maintained.

This vehicle is in exceptional, showroom-quality condition. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, having been professionally detailed and stored in a climate-controlled garage. There are no scratches, dents, or even minor stone chips to be found. Inside, the leather interior remains in pristine condition with no signs of wear, fading, or odors. Mechanically, the car performs perfectly, with all maintenance records up to date and performed exclusively by authorized dealerships. Every feature, from the premium sound system to the climate control, functions exactly as intended. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been meticulously preserved and cared for by its sole owner.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a smooth and reliable driving experience you can count on. While it shows some light, typical signs of use, it remains a solid and attractive car that’s truly ready for its next owner. It's the perfect blend of quality and performance for your daily adventures!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver. The engine starts consistently and runs well for everyday commuting. Please be aware that the transmission shifts a bit roughly, particularly between lower gears, and the exterior shows typical signs of age with some minor paint fading and small scratches. The interior is clean but shows wear on the seats. Overall, it is a dependable car that is ready for the road, though it could use some minor TLC to bring it back to its best.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional value proposition for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds standard expectations for its class. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this unit stands as a testament to quality and enduring performance.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and it’s honestly in such great shape! It’s been super reliable for me and still has that smooth, comfy feel on the road. It’s perfect if you’re looking for a solid, well-cared-for car that’s ready for many more adventures. I’ve loved driving this beauty, and I know you will too—come take it for a spin!

Available is a driver-focused E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies and high-pressure VANOS. This chassis remains rigid with a reinforced rear subframe and upgraded poly-bushings. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers precise engagement, paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. Suspension is sorted with Bilstein B16 coilovers, ensuring neutral handling and minimized body roll. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and a valve adjustment. A mechanically sound specimen ready for the apex.
2019 Sedan. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable daily driver.

This well-maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between reliability and value. The exterior retains its original luster with only minor signs of road use consistent with its age, while the interior remains a smoke-free environment with clean upholstery and no significant wear or tears. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, backed by a consistent maintenance history and a recent multi-point inspection that ensures mechanical integrity. All electronic components, including the infotainment system, power windows, and dual-zone climate control, are fully operational. Equipped with a set of premium tires with plenty of tread remaining, this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with complete confidence. It represents a solid, dependable choice for anyone seeking a high-quality driving experience without the new-car price tag.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating robust mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic presence, it offers an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and comfort. Acquire a vehicle that reflects both sophistication and prudent investment.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle exemplifies consistent maintenance and reliable performance. Meticulously cared for, the exterior maintains a commendable luster while the interior reflects a high standard of preservation. Mechanically sound and rigorously inspected, this offering provides a sophisticated balance of value and enduring quality for the discerning motorist.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? This beauty is in wonderful shape and is totally ready for its next big adventure! It runs like a dream and looks fantastic, having been kept very clean and well-maintained. I’ve absolutely loved driving this car, and I’m sure you will too. Come take it for a spin!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering 414 hp with a soaring 8,400 RPM redline. Mated to a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a factory Variable M Differential Lock, the mechanical synergy provides exceptional rear-wheel-drive dynamics. Maintenance is up to date, including a proactive rod bearing replacement and recent throttle actuator service, ensuring the individual throttle bodies operate with surgical response. The chassis remains taut with EDC (Electronic Damping Control) and upgraded bushings. While showing minor
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Runs smooth.

This 2019 Audi A4 S-Line represents a perfect balance of luxury and daily utility. The exterior, finished in Manhattan Gray Metallic, maintains a high-gloss luster with only minor, age-appropriate imperfections such as a few light stone chips on the front fascia. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the Black leather upholstery shows very little wear, and the Virtual Cockpit and MMI touch display operate flawlessly. This vehicle has been smoke-free and pet-free throughout its ownership. Mechanically, it is in excellent health, having followed a strict maintenance schedule at certified dealerships. The 2.0T engine delivers smooth, responsive power, and the Quattro all-wheel-drive system provides confident handling in all conditions. Recent service includes a fresh synthetic oil change, a new cabin air filter, and a tire rotation. With a complete service history and two sets of keys included, this sedan is ready for immediate enjoyment.

Presenting a distinguished opportunity to acquire a well-maintained vehicle that balances refined aesthetics with proven mechanical integrity. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection process to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. An exceptional choice for those seeking a sophisticated driving experience and enduring value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it delivers a smooth driving experience and remains in commendable mechanical order. The exterior retains its original luster, complemented by a clean, well-preserved interior designed for both comfort and durability. This is a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality automobile at a competitive market valuation.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been treated with lots of love? This car is in wonderful shape and runs like an absolute dream! It’s been super dependable for me, and I’ve made sure to keep it clean and well-maintained. It's perfect for ziping around town or heading out on a weekend adventure. Come take it for a spin—I'm sure you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the high-revving S54 inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing for razor-sharp throttle response. Recent maintenance highlights include a full subframe reinforcement and a VANOS bulletproofing kit, addressing critical chassis and valvetrain longevity. The 6-speed Getrag transmission shifts smoothly, feeding power to a factory limited-slip differential. Equipped with updated bushings and a performance-aligned suspension, this example offers exceptional mechanical feedback and lateral stability. A robust driver’s car with documented preventative care, ready for the apex.
Used vehicle in good condition. Well maintained. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in reliable, impressive condition. The exterior retains a deep luster with only minor, age-appropriate blemishes, while the interior is remarkably clean, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a smoke-free cabin. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, backed by a consistent service history that ensures peace of mind. Every electronic component, from the crisp sound system to the responsive climate control, functions exactly as intended. It sits on a set of tires with plenty of tread remaining and handles the road with the poise of a much newer car. This is a complete package for anyone seeking a dependable, high-quality driver that has been treated with genuine care.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable condition, it features a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior. Every aspect of this automobile has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic appeal. A sophisticated choice for those who demand reliability without compromise.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a superior balance of performance and value. Meticulously inspected to ensure mechanical integrity, this unit exhibits the reliability and aesthetic appeal expected of a premium pre-owned selection. It serves as a distinguished choice for the discerning driver seeking dependable quality and refined road manners.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she's been a total dream. It's in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained over the years, so it's ready to hit the road with a new owner today! It's the perfect, reliable daily driver that still looks fantastic in the driveway. You're going to absolutely love how smooth it handles—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power through its high-revving individual throttle bodies and double VANOS variable valve timing. Mated to a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission, the drivetrain is paired with a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains structurally sound with a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed suspension bushings. Finished in Carbon Black, the exterior shows minor patina consistent with its driver status, while the mechanicals are sorted for spirited performance. A technically sound enthusiast example optimized for the purist.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Service records available. Runs smooth.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of performance and reliability. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, having benefited from regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though a keen eye might spot minor stone chips consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is clean and free of tears, and all electronic features—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—function exactly as they should. Meticulously maintained and thoroughly inspected, it offers a refined driving experience that meets the rigorous standards of the discerning professional. This offering represents an exceptional synthesis of performance and value, ensuring long-term reliability for its next proprietor.
